subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to group licenses by publisher and compute aggregations: total contract value, average cost per seat, and license count. Include publisher name, contract value sum, seat cost average, and license count.

plan.cost_rationale: This is a straightforward aggregation query requiring GROUP BY on publisher with SUM, AVG, and COUNT functions. No complex joins, CTEs, or window functions are needed. A single sql_gen subtask at small tier is sufficient. No cross-source reconciliation or downstream decisions required.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) AS avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
